_comment: qwen-code settings for vllm-mlx on Mac Studio. vllm-mlx is single-model — set the baseUrl only when JANGQ-AI/Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-JANG_4K is the loaded model (otherwise update id + model.name to match the live /v1/models). vllm-mlx does not require auth; envKey resolves to not-needed. Install target: ~/.qwen/settings.json.

openai.name: Qwen3.5-35B-A3B JANG 4-bit (Mac Studio, vllm-mlx)
openai.description: MoE 35B/3B, JANG mixed precision, 262K context — served via vllm-mlx when loaded as primary
